# 📅 Event Details

        **Event:** MODEL FORGE – Machine Learning Competition

---

**🏆 Achievement**

Secured **3rd Position** in **MODEL FORGE**, a solo technical Machine Learning competition.

The recognition was awarded for strong performance in model development, evaluation, and optimization during the event.



---

**👤 Participation Type**
### Solo Competition

Competed individually in a machine learning model development and evaluation challenge.

Responsible for:

        • Data preprocessing and feature engineering  

        • Model design and training  

        • Performance optimization and tuning  

        • Independent experimentation under competition constraints  



---

**🧠 Competition Focus**

The challenge required participants to design and evaluate machine learning models in a competitive environment.

Key tasks included:

        • Building a machine learning model  

        • Optimizing model performance  

        • Evaluating model accuracy and effectiveness  

        • Applying data preprocessing techniques  

        • Performing feature engineering for improved results  


The event emphasized **practical ML implementation rather than theoretical knowledge.**



---

**🚀 Technical Approach**

During the competition the following workflow was applied:

        • Structured data preprocessing  

        • Model training pipeline implementation  

        • Hyperparameter tuning for performance improvement  

        • Evaluation using appropriate performance metrics  

        • Iterative refinement under time constraints  



---

**🎯 Key Outcomes**

        • Demonstrated independent machine learning problem-solving ability  

        • Applied real-world model evaluation techniques  

        • Competed under live competitive pressure  

        • Secured Top 3 ranking among participants
